message.content: Search the codebase for existing avatar ring badge implementations. Look for CSS classes like "avatar-ring", "ring-legend", "ring-og", or similar patterns that create glowing rings around avatars. I need to see the exact CSS properties used (border-radius, padding, background, box-shadow, animation) so we can match the pattern. Check files like PostCard CSS, UserSearchResults CSS, Notifications CSS, and any other component that shows avatar rings. Be thorough - search for "ring" in CSS files, and also look for "legend" and "og" class names in CSS.
